docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, JIMMY LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 S. VAN NESS AVE #280 $1,585.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,585.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-06-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT VACATES PREMIES ON OR BEFORE EXPIRATION OF STAY PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE ALL RENTS AND DAMAGES AND ENTER A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT OR DEFENDANT MYA HAVE THE JUDGMENT SET ASIDE AND THE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
